title: Finn Scarlet Sword
description: Turn any sword into Finn Scarlet Sword just by renaming to "Scarlet Sword" in the anvil❗NO MODS NEEDED❗⚔️ ADVENTURE TIME ⚔️
body:
# Finn Scarlet Sword
### ⚙️ Info
- Compatible With: Vanilla Minecraft 1.21.5+ ✅
- Type: Custom Item Model, Renamed on the Anvil
- Doesn't has a [CIT Resewn]([https://modrinth.com/user/Super_Jose](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)) version yet. Still relying on 1.21.5+ vanilla feature.
### 📜 About
> You're a fan of Adventure Time? Why not play with Finn's Scarlet Sword in your minecraft?
> This pack turns any sword into Finn Scarlet Sword just by renaming to "Scarlet Sword" in the anvil❗NO MODS NEEDED❗
### ⚠️ You need to know
> When Using CIT Resewn Texture packs, you can rename the items to pretty much anything that contains a certain word; **But not in vanilla**; you need to put **the exact same name** as the resourcepack says. In this case, **"Scarlet Sword"**
### 🗨️ Contact
> My Discord DM -> caiosm1
